name: Crazy Bike
short_description: Race through the chaotic streets of New York in Crazy Bike, a modern reimagining of the arcade classic Crazy Courier. Deliver packages at breakneck speed, dodge traffic, pull off insane stunts, and master the art of urban biking in a fast-paced open city playground.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Crazy Bike, a high-speed urban delivery game inspired by the legendary arcade chaos of Crazy Courier, now reborn in a vibrant, modern-day New York City.

Jump on your bike and dive into a living, breathing metropolis where every street is a shortcut, every rooftop is a launchpad, and every delivery is a race against time.

As a fearless courier navigating Manhattan’s packed avenues, Brooklyn’s side streets, and neon-lit night districts, your mission is simple:

Deliver fast. Ride wild. Break the rules.

But in NYC, nothing is ever that easy.

Traffic jams, aggressive drivers, unpredictable pedestrians, construction zones, and the city’s verticality turn every run into an adrenaline-fueled challenge. Chain together daring moves, drift through yellow cabs, grind railings, launch off staircases, and discover hidden routes only the boldest riders can master.

Earn cash and reputation by completing deliveries with speed and style. The faster you are — and the crazier your route — the bigger the rewards.

Upgrade your bike to match your playstyle:

  • Speed-focused builds to outrun traffic

  • Trick setups to maximize style points

  • Handling upgrades to weave through tight city spaces

Explore an open NYC playground designed for momentum and creativity, where mastering the flow of the city is the key to becoming the ultimate courier.

Whether you're chasing leaderboard dominance, perfecting stunt routes, or simply enjoying the thrill of urban freeride, Crazy Bike delivers an arcade experience built for modern players — blending nostalgia with cutting-edge visuals and fluid physics.

In this city, the streets are your racetrack.

And every delivery is a chance to ride like a legend.
